nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Hey, she looks just like you!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: We have nothing in common…

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Actually she's right - you're both a pegasi, both wearing glasses. Yor're almost exactly alike.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: But unlike her, I don't…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Spoilers alert!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Don't distract me, please.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Okay, okay, we're silent.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The empty bottle looked seductively empty.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: It definitely needed to be filled with something.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: First, it was necessary to pour in the base - dihydrogen monoxide.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Eeeeem... what is it?

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Water!

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Can we take it from the sink?

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The water from the sink is too polluted, it is not suitable for experiments.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: We need to find a bottle of clean water.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The basis for any experiment is dihydrogen monoxide.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Exactly what we need to get started.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Now we need to pour it into an empty bottle.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The infusion of the first ingredient was the official start of the experiment.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The next in line was sodium thorax.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: What's this?

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: A big green bottle.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: A green bottle is successfully found!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Sodium thorax mixed with dehydrogen monoxide produced a weak reaction.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The liquid only turns green slightly.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: This is due to the lack of electrons in the thorax shell…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Hey, hey!

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: It's all cool, but…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Let's do less sciency-thing and more history, okay?

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: …okay

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Next in line is magic acid.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Anticipating the question - it's a purple bottle.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: It's lucky that it was standing on the stove and warming up all this time.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Otherwise, we would have to re-heat it and wait.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The hot magic acid gives a purple foam and allows the reaction to proceed much

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Next, the malic acid ester was needed.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: …A red bottle

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: A red bottle is successfully found.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: The entire liquid turned mostly red due to the fact that malic acid is very…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: …strong

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Next in line was omonium flutterate.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: It can be recognized by the neck - it is made in such a way that it does not evaporate quickly.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Now you need to bring it to the experiment site as carefully as possible.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: You need to be very careful with omonium flutterate, because it quickly evaporates upon contact with air.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: When the liquid turns multicolored, it can be assumed that the reaction was successful.

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Some kind of strange soup.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: These are the kinds of things that happen when a chemical-pony-scientist has nothing to do at work.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: She doesn't even know what she's creating.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: But let's not talk about sad things.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: I've never been able to pronounce the name of the next ingredient the first time.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: ...ahem

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Tirekochlod…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Tirekochloridoav…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Tirekochloridoamony…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: Don't worry about it, just tell me what color it was.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: …black

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: That's the bottle we need!

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: This...

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: this liquid is so powerful that it instantly turns our entire mixture black.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: And now we'll find out what happens if you mix all these ingredients in this order:

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: At first, the liquid will start to change colors dramatically.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Then shake slightly…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: …As a result, an explosion will occur due to the pressure difference.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: And the whole room will gradually be enveloped in a haze that is definitely not worth breathing.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: And our scientist, who allowed herself to deviate so much from safety technology…

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Is completely disappeared into it with her colleagues.
